svg.title: Scatter plot of tweet stance clusters from topic modeling on gun control discourse
svg.desc: A research figure showing three colored clusters of tweets by stance, a legend with counts, and a bar chart of top discussion topics
svg.text: Stance Clustering: Gun Control Discourse on Twitter
BERTweet embeddings, reduced via UMAP · n = 1,842 tweets
Fig. 1. Ongoing analysis, manuscript in preparation.
